caption: A person's hands are shown working on a white wooden surface, using crafting tools to cut patterned paper. The person wears a white wristband on their left arm. They use a grey and clear paper trimmer to cut a piece of olive-green patterned paper. In the initial frames, the person adjusts the trimmer's guide and holds the paper in place. As the sequence progresses, they slide a long, white ruler across the white surface and position it against the side of the trimmer. A small white rectangular block with the text "MEMENTO" is placed on the table nearby. In the bottom left corner of each frame, a logo reads "Stamping Jill" next to a small heart. The action focuses on the precise alignment and movement of the crafting tools to prepare the paper for cutting.
